title: The Elohim
summary: Co-creator beings the archive says humanity is 'graduating' to become.
markdown:
The **Elohim** appear in the archive as an order of **co-creator beings** — and as a
destination. In the September 20, 2020 session Unimetrix 1 describes humanity "becoming the
level of Elohim… the being that co-creates universes," saying "the human species are
graduating to that level."

So the Elohim are both a race the archive names and a stage of development it points humanity
toward — bound up with the [Rainbow Light Body](/lore/rainbow-light-body/), the
[Singularity](/lore/immortality-singularity/), and the co-creative power the sessions promise.
They are closely tied to the [Council of Seven](/lore/council-of-seven/), which the archive
calls a council of Elohim.

In Unimetrix 1's cosmology the Elohim mark the top of the ascent: from human, through the
upgrades and awakenings of the sessions, to a being that creates worlds.
